name: bug-bounty-intelligence-mcp
description: MCP server for AI-powered smart contract security analysis. $5 USDC/scan via x402. Drawn from 27,681 Sherlock/Code4rena submissions, verified acceptance rates from 1,032 exact-reconciled findings. Includes a free, standalone dataset (vulnerability-acceptance-rates.json) — no server required.
author: holistis
